calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title-Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Bruce E. Chan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Peter B. Bothel, Esq. for Plaintiff: Transamerica Pyramid Properties, LLC. an Iowa limited liability company, Transamerica Corporation, a Delaware corporation, Transamerica Realty Investment Properties, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
No other appearances.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): All persons claiming any interest in , or lien upon the Real Property fully decribed in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details Judgment and the subject property.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Continued To Jan-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Peter B. Bothel, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Transamerica Pyramid Properties, LLC, a Iowa limited liability company.
Marypat Noeker, Vice President - National Underwriter for Chicago Title, and witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Lis Pendens was filed on July 23, 2007.

The Court cannot proceed with today's hearing as plaintiff is required to obtain a default naming the proper property in question.

Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to January 6, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218. Ms. Noeker's appearance is waived at the next calling of the case.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Continued To Sep-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, 3689.

Peter B. Bothel, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Transamerica Pyramid Prperties, LLC, a Iowa Limited Liability Company.
Mary Pat Noeker, National Underwriter for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Default entered against defendant All Persons Claiming Any Interest In, Or Lien Upon The Real Property Herein Described Or Any Part Thereof on March 4, 2008.

Proof of Publication of Summons and Complaint does not reflect the correct parcel of property at issue in plaintiff's complaint. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to September 16, 2008.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Off Calendar
